title: Create Faster
description: A simple "Create Mod" modpack that brings to the table: optimization, and simplicity.
body:
# Goal Create Faster, a modpack that make your pc not to suffer when running the heavy "Create Mod". Combining with other mods for acheiving a better playing experience. # Mods
Client Version Mods
- Create - Create Crafts & Additions - Create Deco - Create Enchantment Industry - Create: Diesel Generators - Create: Garnished - Embeddium - Entity Culling - Farmer's Delight - FerriteCore - Just Enough Items - Memory Leak Fix - Storage Drawers - Xaero's Minimap - Xaero's World Map
Server Version Mods
- Create - Create Crafts & Additions - Create Deco - Create Enchantment Industry - Create: Diesel Generators - Create: Garnished - Farmer's Delight - FerriteCore - Memory Leak Fix - Radium - Storage Drawers
# FAQ Q: How i can suggest ideas for mods? A: Create an issue on the project's github page. Q: why not higher than 1.20.1 versions of minecraft? A: Create hasn't updated yet, so it's holding back the other mods. Q: Why Neoforge/Forge A: Because Create Forge/Neoforge is more updated than fabric.
